title: Rhynchospora rigidifolia
taxonomy: Rhynchospora rigidifolia belongs to the family Cyperaceae, which is a large and diverse group of monocotyledonous plants commonly known as sedges. This family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Rhynchospora rigidifolia being part of the subfamily Cyperoideae. Within the subfamily Cyperoideae, it is classified under the tribe Schoeneae. The tribe Schoeneae is a relatively small group of sedges that are mostly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Rhynchospora rigidifolia is a specific species within the tribe Schoeneae.
